hero_subtitle: ịkwụ ụgwọ n'enweghị nsogbu, Ntinye ego ngwa ngwa.
hero_description: Nwee mmasị na VTU kachasị mma na Nigeria. PayStation na-enye airtime, data, na ịkwụ ụgwọ ozugbo na nchekwa kachasị elu.
footer_tagline: Na-enyere ndụ gị aka na VTU, data na ịkwụ ụgwọ ozugbo.
why_choose: Gịnị kpatara ị ga-eji họrọ PayStation?
why_desc: Ihe niile ị chọrọ maka azụmahịa gị n'otu ebe.
data_rates_desc: Anyị na-enye atụmatụ data kacha ọnụ ala na netwọkụ niile na Nigeria.
testimonials_title: ọtụtụ puku mmadụ hụrụ anyị n'anya
testimonials_desc: Nụrụ ihe ndị ọrụ na ndị nnọchi anya anyị na-ekwu maka PayStation.
faq_subtitle: Chọta azịza nye ajụjụ ndị mmadụ na-ajụ maka PayStation.
chat_with_us: ị ka nwere ajụjụ? Gwa anyị okwu
ready_to_simplify: Ready to simplify your digital life?
trust_paystation: Join thousands of Nigerians who trust PayStation for zero-failure transactions every single day.
auth_login_desc: Tinye nkọwa gị iji banye n'akaụntụ gị
auth_signup_desc: Mepụta akaụntụ iji malite njem gị na PayStation
auth_agree_tc: Ekwenyere m na Atụmatụ na ọnụ ụgwọ
auth_or_continue: Ma ọ bụ gaa n'ihu na
otp_desc: Anyị ziteere gị koodu nọmba 4 na ozi-e gị. Biko tinye ya n'okpuru.
ready_trans: ị dọla njikere maka azụmahịa gị na-esote?
promo_desc: Nweta 10% na azụmahịa mbụ niile nke ndị ị kpọtara.
agent_success_msg: Your application has been submitted for admin review.
agent_req_usage: Minimum 7 days of active usage required.
agent_req_trans: Minimum ₦10,000 total successful transactions in the last 7 days required.
feat_mobile_desc: Ikuku na data ozugbo maka netwọkụ niile.
feat_bills_desc: ịkwụ ụgwọ ọkụ na DSTV, GOTV ozugbo.
feat_exam_desc: Nweta WAEC, NECO na JAMB pin ozugbo.
feat_secure_desc: Tinye ego na jikwaa ego gị na nchekwa.
faq_q1: Kedu ka m ga-esi zụọ data?
faq_a1_s2: ọ bụrụ na ị debanyeghị aha, biko pịa 'debanye aha' n'elu
faq_a1_s3: Mgbe ị banyere, pịa 'Fund Wallet' iji tinye ego
faq_a1_s4: Pịa 'buy data' ma họrọ netwọkụ ị chọrọ
faq_a1_s5: Pịa 'send' ma tinye PIN azụmahịa gị
faq_q3: Kedu ka m ga-esi tinye ego n'akpa m?
faq_a3_desc: ị nwere ike itinye ego site n'ọwa mịrin wọyị:
faq_a3_opt2: Nkwụnye ego online na ATM card gị.
faq_q4: ị nwere ike idezie akaụntụ m?
agent_promo: ọnụ ego a bụ maka ndị ọrụ nkịtị. Bụrụ onye nnọchi maka rangwame.
err_auth_fail: Ozi-e ma ọ bụ okwu nzuzo adịghị mma.
err_user_exists: Onye ọrụ nwere ozi-e a ma ọ bụ aha njirimara a adịla.
err_otp_invalid: Koodu OTP adịghị mma. Biko lelee ozi-e gị.
success_signup: Emepụtara akaụntụ! Biko chere ozi-e gị.
tc_agree_error: ị ga-ekweta na atụmatụ na ọnụ ụgwọ iji gaa n'ihu.
tc_content_1_text: Nabata na PayStation. Site n'iji ọrụ anyị, ị kwetara na atụmatụ ndịa. Biko gụọ ha nke ọma.
tc_content_2_text: ị nwere ọrụ maka idobe okwu nzuzo gị na nchekwa. ị kwetara ịnabata ọrụ maka ọrụ niile na-eme n'okpuru akaụntụ gị.
tc_content_3_text: A na-eme azụmahịa niile ozugbo. Gbalịa na ị nyere nkọwa onye nnata dị mma.
tc_content_4_text: ị gaghi eji PayStation maka ihe ọ bụla megidere iwu, gụnyere wayo, ma ọ bụ ịbanye na usoro ndị ọzọ n'enweghị ikike.
tc_content_5_text: PayStation agaghị aza ajụjụ maka mmebi dị iche iche na-esite n'iji ọrụ anyị.
